query_intent: For April-October 2000 linked customer-item flows, report per-item and per-store profitability by combining April store sales, subsequent store returns, and subsequent catalog sales.

dag_nodes.intent: Join April 2000 store sales to matching returns (Apr-Oct 2000) and to catalog sales on the same customer/item (Apr-Oct 2000), then aggregate store sales profit, return loss, and catalog sales profit by item/store.
